name: Inverness Clubhouse
desc: 2072 Azalea Dr — the heart of the neighborhood.
detail: The gathering room and point of reference for everything else.
cardDesc: 2072 Azalea Drive, Roswell, GA 30075. The neighborhood's gathering room and the point of reference for everything else.

name: Chattahoochee Nature Center
desc: 127 acres of trails, wildlife rehab, and river access.
detail: A unit of the Chattahoochee River National Recreation Area.
cardDesc: 127 acres of forest, meadow, and rehabilitated wildlife along the river — a unit of the Chattahoochee River National Recreation Area.

name: Roswell Riverwalk
desc: A boardwalk trail along the Chattahoochee, paved end to end.
detail: Runs south to the dam at Morgan Falls.
cardDesc: A paved boardwalk running south from the nature center to the dam at Morgan Falls, with fishing piers and a canoe launch.

name: Roswell Town Square
desc: The 1839 square, with the original bandstand.
detail: Mill workers' cottages and Barrington Hall across the street.
cardDesc: Laid out in 1839 by Roswell King, with the original bandstand, the founding cottages, and Barrington Hall across the street.

name: Downtown Roswell
desc: Restaurants, shops, and galleries along Canton Street.
detail: The monthly Alive After Five street festival, April through October.
cardDesc: Canton Street's restaurants, galleries, and the monthly Alive After Five street festival, April through October.
